meta.description: AI-powered financial modeling for divorce settlements. See your 10-year financial future across every scenario.

hero.h1:
Know Exactly Where You Stand.
Before You Sign Anything.
hero.h2: AI-powered financial modeling for divorce. See your 10-year financial future across every settlement scenario — in minutes, not months.
hero.sub: No lawyer needed. Takes 20 minutes. Download your report.

fearHook.hook: How much of that is paying your attorney to explain numbers you could calculate yourself?

steps.title: Enter Your Financial Picture
steps.desc: Assets, debts, income, children. Secure, private, takes 20 minutes.

steps.title: Build Your Scenarios
steps.desc: Keep the house? Sell it? Let them have it? Model up to 3 outcomes.

steps.title: Get Your 10-Year Projection
steps.desc: AI analyzes your jurisdiction's laws and projects each scenario. Download the PDF.

features.title: Everything You Need to Negotiate From Strength

items.title: Every Scenario, Side by Side
items.desc: See the 10-year financial impact of each choice before you decide.

items.title: Your Jurisdiction. Your Rules.
items.desc: California community property? UK Section 25? German Zugewinn? SettleLens knows the formulas.

items.title: A Report Your Lawyer Respects
items.desc: Professional PDF: asset breakdown, projection charts, negotiation strategy.

social.title: From People Who've Been Where You Are

quotes.text: I walked into mediation knowing exactly which offer to accept. That clarity was worth more than any lawyer.
quotes.author: Sarah M., California

quotes.text: The PDF report legitimized my position. My attorney said it was the most prepared she'd seen a client.
quotes.author: James T., London

quotes.text: Three scenarios, side by side. I finally understood what keeping the house actually meant for the next decade.
quotes.author: Michelle K., Texas

finalCta.title: See Your Settlement Clearly
finalCta.sub: Join thousands who've walked into negotiations prepared.
finalCta.note: No credit card required for basic analysis.

footer.disclaimer: SettleLens provides financial modeling for informational purposes only. Not legal or financial advice. Always consult a qualified attorney.
footer.copyright: © 2026 SettleLens. Financial modeling, not legal advice.

steps.title: Where are you located?
steps.subtitle: We apply the financial formulas for your jurisdiction.

steps.title: Your Assets
steps.subtitle: List everything you and your spouse own.

steps.title: Your Debts
steps.subtitle: Mortgages, loans, credit cards — the full picture.

steps.title: Income
steps.subtitle: Yours and your spouse's, gross and net.

steps.title: Children
steps.subtitle: If applicable — ages and custody arrangement.

steps.title: Build Your Scenarios
steps.subtitle: What are the possible outcomes? Let's model them.

disclaimer.full: SettleLens provides financial modeling for informational purposes only. Results are estimates based on publicly available legal formulas and do not constitute legal, tax, or financial advice. Always consult a qualified attorney before making any decisions.

userScenarios.title: What decision are you trying to make?
userScenarios.sub: SettleLens turns emotionally complex decisions into comparable financial scenarios.

cards.title: What happens if I keep the house?
cards.desc: Compare keeping, selling, or transferring the home — and see the long-term cash flow impact.

cards.title: Does this offer actually work for me?
cards.desc: Model the proposed split across assets, debts, and support payments to see 10-year financial outcomes.

cards.title: How do I prepare for my lawyer meeting?
cards.desc: Organize your assets, debts, income, and scenarios into a professional report — before the meeting.

whatItDoesNot.title: What SettleLens does — and what it doesn't
whatItDoesNot.note: Complex or high-risk cases require professional legal support.

cards.title: Your data is not sold
cards.desc: Financial inputs are never used for advertising or shared with third parties.

cards.title: Sensitive data is never logged
cards.desc: Asset values, income, and scenario details are not written to developer logs.

cards.title: You control your data
cards.desc: Export your full financial data or permanently delete your account at any time.

cards.title: Financial modeling, not legal advice
cards.desc: SettleLens is a preparation tool. Complex cases require a qualified lawyer.

countryCoverage.title: Built for your jurisdiction
countryCoverage.sub: SettleLens applies country-specific property regime assumptions for financial scenario modeling.
countryCoverage.note: Local judicial discretion, hidden assets, and complex agreements may produce different outcomes. Always verify with a qualified attorney.

attorneyPrep.title: Go into your lawyer meeting prepared
attorneyPrep.sub: Instead of scattered notes, bring a structured financial overview — assets, debts, income, children, and scenarios in one professional report.

houseDemo.title: The house is usually the biggest decision.
houseDemo.sub: See the financial difference between keeping, selling, or transferring it.
houseDemo.note: Simplified model — assumes 3% appreciation, 5% investment return, 6% sale costs.

waitlist.success: You're on the list. We'll be in touch.

dashboard.readyDesc: Your financial data is entered. Select a scenario to run the AI-powered projection.
